titleStmt.title: SII 19.168: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 168. (A.R. No. 559 of 1921.) PUḶḶAMAṄGAI NEAR PAŚUPATIKŌYIL, PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of land after purchase at Nallūrchēri, for offerings during the morning service in the temple of Tiruvālanduṟai-Mahādēva at Puḷḷamaṅgalam in Kiḻār-kūṟṟam by one Śembiyaṉ Mahāvali-Vāṇarāyar, who is evidently different from the Western Gaṅga chief Prithvipati II on whom Parāntaka I conferred the title ‘Śembiyaṉ-Māvali-Vāṇarāya’ some time between the 9th and 15th years of his reign. [S.I.I. Vol. III. pp. 376 and 381 and M.E.R. for 1896. para 8]. This may probably be assigned to Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu kiḻārkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam puḷḷamaṅkalattu tiruvālantuṟai mahādevakku cempiyaṉ ma
hāvalivaṇarāyar ciṟukālaisantikku Iruṉāḻi Araciyālum Araippiṭi neyyamirtālum nicatamum tiruvamitu ceyvataṟku vilaikku kuṭutta
ṉilam śrīkaṇṭamaṅkalattu vūṟkiḻ Iraṇṭu vānmayum Uḷpaṭa Āṉṉukāl Ivaṉ cantipuṟa māka vilai kuṭutta nilam
nalūrcerikiḻ �nma .
Digital edition of SII 19.168 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
